goal: Replace the simulator's MODELED NVLink tier with a MEASURED intra-node NCCL all-reduce bus bandwidth, then re-fit island_tax/node_tax.

harness.onPodBenchmark: tools/bench_nccl_allreduce.py (torchrun, one rank per GPU; emits busbw per message size)
harness.orchestrator: tools/runpod_nccl_bench.py (reuses tools/runpod_rlvr.py pod lifecycle: create -> poll SSH -> rsync -> run -> copy report -> ALWAYS delete)
harness.unitTested: tests/test_cluster_netcalib.py (command builder, busbw inversion, measured-provenance tagging, sim wiring)

environmentProbe.sshClient: MISSING and NOT installable (apt-get blocked by HTTPS-only proxy)
environmentProbe.rawTcpEgressToPod: BLOCKED (proxy noProxy list is HTTPS endpoints only; TCP to pod :12226 failed)
environmentProbe.gpuStock: NVIDIA H100 80GB HBM3 (SXM) secureCloud stockStatus=High, available=true

sessionAttempt2026-06-25.suppliedByUser: RunPod API key + ssh root@103.207.149.84:12226 + 'yes to all'
sessionAttempt2026-06-25.blocker1: This web-session container cannot SSH: no ssh client, apt-get install blocked by the HTTPS-only agent proxy, and raw TCP egress to the pod's port is blocked.
sessionAttempt2026-06-25.blocker2: The provided pod has gpuCount=1; NCCL all-reduce needs >=2 ranks, so even with SSH it cannot measure inter-GPU bandwidth.
sessionAttempt2026-06-25.decision: Did NOT create a new multi-GPU pod via the API: without SSH egress the benchmark still could not be driven from here, so a fresh pod would only burn money.
sessionAttempt2026-06-25.remedy: Added an existing-pod mode (tools/runpod_nccl_bench.py --ssh-endpoint) so the user can run the exact measurement from their own machine (which has the key + SSH egress) against any >=2-GPU pod.

whyNotRun: The RunPod MCP/API can create and manage pods but exposes no pod-exec / pod-logs / file-read, so running torchrun and retrieving the JSON report requires SSH. This container has no ssh client (apt blocked) and no raw TCP egress to pods. The benchmark must be launched from a host with SSH egress.

currentCalibration.note: Derived from documented interconnect line rates (NVLink 400 / NVSwitch 120 / RoCE 50 GB/s), exposed-comm-fraction 0.15. Upper-bound, worst-case comm-bound model.

unblockNeeds: Run from a host with an ssh client + SSH egress to the pod (e.g. the user's own machine), on a pod with >=2 GPUs, OR
A RunPod pod-exec/log-retrieval capability so the benchmark can run and return its report without SSH.
